rows.label: qev070105_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Who are you? Another
assassin hired by that lot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0002
rows.name:
To still not learn your lesson
after taking such a beating... What
truly Lβ#Sa∞z@x* folks you are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him you are not an assassin.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the word "Lβ#Sa∞z@x*".

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0003
rows.name: Hm...? Then who exactly are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0004
rows.name:
I have nothing to tell the assassins
targeting me! I'll char you to a
crisp just like before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wait... What was that? You
didn't come here to attack me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0006
rows.name:
...What? You're a BLADE? I've heard there
were people like that around, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmm... Looking closely,
you seem quite A∀Pl*℃O...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0008
rows.name:
Veven isn't much help lately
anyway, so maybe I should have
you assist me with the y#$K+ИG*...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes... Hey, you there.
My name is B∑#%*K}L.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you want a job, I have a good
proposition. Won't you listen to
what I have to say for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0030
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what A∀Pl*℃O means.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0040
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what a y#$K+ИG* is.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0011
rows.name:
Did that not translate well?
How should I say it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0012
rows.name:
...In Earth words, I suppose it means
something like "good-natured"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0013
rows.name:
Did you hear me talking to myself?
Well, it might be better if you don't
know about that sort of thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmm... But no matter what I do, my
words just don't convey well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0015
rows.name:
The language of the planet I was
on has many sounds that can't be
pronounced in your language.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0016
rows.name:
So it seems that even on this Mira,
even my name doesn't translate properly.
Well... just call me Doctor B.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Now then, about the job
I want to ask of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'd like you to go and fetch a few
things necessary for my research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0019
rows.name:
It should be an easy job for
someone like you. How about
it? I'll pay handsomely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0050
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for details about the job.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0060
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what Doctor B is researching.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0020
rows.name:
Getting straight to the point
no matter who you're facing...
As expected of a professional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0021
rows.name:
First, I want you to head west out
of NLA, go to the Lost Waterway,
and bring back some Dikki Sap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0022
rows.name:
I have something I must
complete urgently. How about
it? Will you accept this job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hmm, I do like those who possess such
a spirit of scientific inquiry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0024
rows.name:
Well, how should I say this...
For both our sakes, let's keep
that a secret for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0025
rows.name:
Anyway, first I want you to head west
out of NLA, go to the Lost Waterway,
and bring back some Dikki Sap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'm absolutely not conducting any
suspicious research. How about
it? Will you accept this job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0027
rows.name:
You'll do it! As expected
of someone who is A∀Pl*℃O![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0028
rows.name:
Lately, my assistant Veven has been
engrossed in repairing his spaceship and
won't help me out, so I was in a bind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. As fellow wanderers
of the universe cast away on this planet,
let's join hands and survive together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0030
rows.name:
The thing I want you to fetch is
called Dikki Sap. It should be in
the Lost Waterway, west of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0031
rows.name:
You BLADEs are good at this kind of job,
right? Hurry up and fetch it for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0071
rows.name: Strongly nod and tell him to leave it to you.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0080
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask about Doctor B's past.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'm counting on you... I have
to complete *that* quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0033
rows.name:
I've gotten used to living in this
place, but after all, a person...
must return to the place they belong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0034
rows.name:
I can't trust you that much yet.
Let me keep the details a secret.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Sorry. There are many
folks targeting me, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0036
rows.name:
Oh! You're back! Well? Were you
able to obtain the Dikki Sap?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0037
rows.name:
Good... Now, as long as I have the core
frame, I can execute the y#$K+ИG*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0038
rows.name:
Hm... What? You were attacked by a
man named Gud while getting this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0039
rows.name:
...I'm sorry about that. He's
been aiming for my technology
for quite some time now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0040
rows.name:
Seeing he was no match for me directly, he
probably targeted you, who had contact with
me, to try and extract information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0090
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask about the technology Doctor B possesses.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0100
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0101
rows.name: Express concern for Doctor B's safety.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0041
rows.name:
Of course. Inside this head of
mine is wisdom that far surpasses
that of those Ma-non folks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0042
rows.name:
Haha! As if I would lose to
anyone from this era! But thank
you for worrying about me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0043
rows.name:
Let's see... I've caused you
trouble, so I'll make an exception
and tell you my true identity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Hehe, don't be
surprised, okay? I am...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0045
rows.name:
A person from the future... who
came from the far end of time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hahaha! Perhaps I am what you
Earthlings will look like hundreds
of millions of years from now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0110
rows.name: Believe

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0111
rows.name: Believe Doctor B is from the future and tell him so.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0120
rows.name: Disbelieve

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0121
rows.name: Laugh it off and say that's impossible.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ho... You believe such a wild story?
Earthlings are truly adaptable creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0048
rows.name:
When Veven first heard my story,
he rudely burst out laughing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Well, that makes things quick. You see,
I have to return to the future soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0050
rows.name:
To do that, I need you to procure a car
to serve as the body for the y#$K+ИG*.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0051
rows.name:
Well, whether you believe it or not
is up to you. Veven burst out laughing
when he heard this story too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0052
rows.name: However... I must return to the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0053
rows.name:
To do that, I need you to procure a car
to serve as the body for the y#$K+ИG*.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0130
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask what y#$K+ИG* is.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0140
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask how he plans to return to the future.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0054
rows.name:
Damn it... y#$K+ИG* doesn't translate,
does it. How should I phrase it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0055
rows.name:
Hmm... A device that transcends the
absolute domain of time... Should
I just call it a time machine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0056
rows.name:
People in this era probably haven't
discovered the theory to @as∞*#я*
the y#$K+ИG* yet, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0057
rows.name:
With my power, crossing
time is a simple task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0058
rows.name:
Hmm... A man named Graham just
told me he wants to sell a car
at a very cheap price.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0059
rows.name:
Negotiate well and buy a good car for me.
Here, this is the money for the car.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0060
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. In the
meantime, I'll go fetch one more
part needed for the experiment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0061
rows.name:
I'll leave the car to you. Graham
should be in the parking lot in
the center of Melville Street.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0062
rows.name:
As long as I have that, once the
other part is ready, I can conduct
the time machine experiment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0063
rows.name:
Damn it... I can't get in touch
with him at all! That Veven!
Where is he wandering around?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0106
rows.name:
Wh... Why... It hasn't moved an
inch from this spot... Damn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0107
rows.name:
I've lived for over a thousand
years, but this is a first! What
on earth was the problem...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0108
rows.name:
...Wh-Why is everyone here in Mira
3,000 years in the future...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0109
rows.name:
...Ah! C-Could it be you chased
after me in Doc's time machine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0110
rows.name:
Thank you, Doc! Hehe! Then let's
all explore the future together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0190
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0191
rows.name: Play along with Veven's misunderstanding and suggest exploring the future.

rows.label: qev070105_JNK0200
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070105_SEL0201
rows.name: Correct Veven's misunderstanding.

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0111
rows.name:
It's actually amazing how the
surrounding scenery hasn't changed
at all even after 3,000 years![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0112
rows.name:
I wonder what kind of civilizational shifts
happened during these 3,000 years!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0113
rows.name:
...Eh? What's that? I couldn't
hear you. My ears are ringing,
probably from crossing time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0114
rows.name:
Even so, it's amazing! I've become the
very first time traveler on Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0115
rows.name:
Argh, shut up! Was leaving the
operation to this shrimp the problem!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0116
rows.name:
Guh...! But the numbers had
reached the critical point...
If this doesn't work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0117
rows.name:
...I have no choice but to try
Anti-y#$K+ИG* navigation...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0118
rows.name:
Hmm... With that, even if this
is a special timeline, I should
be able to @as∞#c*я# it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0119
rows.name:
Alright... Hey, I'm sorry, but
could you go get some Topaz
Wine dropped by a Tapenta?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0120
rows.name:
With that, I'll definitely succeed in
time navigation this time. I swear it on
the wisdom of Doctor B... Absolutely![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0121
rows.name:
The numbers had perfectly reached
the critical point... So why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070105_MSG0122
rows.name:
Damn it...! I swear on my wisdom, I
will absolutely fly to the future...!
Make sure you get me that Topaz Wine![ST:wait ]
